title: Implementation; rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1075.5. Implementation; rules and regulations

            The secretary shall, pursuant to the Administrative Procedure Act, adopt rules and regulations necessary to implement this Part.

            Acts 1995, No. 1306, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.106 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1075.5.  Implementation; rules and regulations
The secretary shall, pursuant to the Administrative Procedure Act, adopt rules and
regulations necessary to implement this Part.
Acts 1995, No. 1306, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.106 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
